title: Add Dark Mode with next-themes
summary: Install next-themes, wrap the app in ThemeProvider, build a theme toggle, and wire it up with Tailwind CSS v4 and shadcn/ui.
declaration: I will add dark/light/system theme support using next-themes. This installs ThemeProvider, adds a theme toggle component, and configures Tailwind CSS v4 dark mode. If you are not using Tailwind or shadcn/ui, say so and I will adjust.
